_note: Single source of truth for missing country-data policy. load.js (normalizeCountries) fills these ONCE at makeRoller time so the model sees complete data and carries zero `??` fallbacks in the math. Only vulnEmployment, unemployment, and isco are actually absent in the current dataset; the rest are present on all 241 countries and these constants are defensive. vulnEmployment is NOT a flat constant — it is derived in load.js from the country's life-expectancy instability (matching the legacy precarity estimate); listed here as null to document that it has a computed policy.
